input.prompt: I want to build a real-time collaborative dashboard where users can see live updates. What .NET project templates could work? I need you to search available templates and show me the top 3 options with their key parameters.

data.content: I want to build a real-time collaborative dashboard where users can see live updates. What .NET project templates could work? I need you to search available templates and show me the top 3 options with their key parameters.
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-04-28T00:52:57.235Z</current_datetime>

I want to build a real-time collaborative dashboard where users can see live updates. What .NET project templates could work? I need you to search available templates and show me the top 3 options with their key parameters.

input.initialPrompt: I want to build a real-time collaborative dashboard where users can see live updates. What .NET project templates could work? I need you to search available templates and show me the top 3 options with their key parameters.

data.reasoningText: The user wants to search for .NET project templates that could work for a real-time collaborative dashboard. Let me use the `dotnet new` command to search for relevant templates.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new search \"real-time\" 2>/dev/null | head -40", "description": "Search dotnet templates for real-time", "initial_wait": 15}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new search \"signalr\" 2>/dev/null | head -40", "description": "Search dotnet templates for SignalR", "initial_wait": 15}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new search \"blazor\" 2>/dev/null | head -40", "description": "Search dotnet templates for Blazor", "initial_wait": 15}

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Get Blazor Web App template parameters

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Get Blazor Web App template parameters

arguments.command: dotnet new mudblazor --help 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; dotnet new install MudBlazor.Templates --dry-run 2>/dev/null | head -20

data.reasoningText:
Now let me get the details/parameters for the top 3 most relevant templates for a real-time collaborative dashboard. The best options would be:

1. The built-in Blazor Web App template (blazor) - supports SignalR natively for real-time
2. The SignalR trigger template for Azure Functions
3. MudBlazor - a popular Blazor component library with dashboard components

Let me get the parameters for the most relevant built-in templates first.

arguments.description: Get Blazor Web App template parameters

arguments.command: dotnet new mudblazor --help 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; dotnet new install MudBlazor.Templates --dry-run 2>/dev/null | head -20

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new blazor --help 2>/dev/null | head -60", "description": "Get Blazor Web App template parameters", "initial_wait": 10}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new webapi --help 2>/dev/null | head -60", "description": "Get Web API template parameters", "initial_wait": 10}

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new mudblazor --help 2>/dev/null; echo \"---\"; dotnet new install MudBlazor.Templates --dry-run 2>/dev/null | head -20", "description": "Get MudBlazor template info", "initial_wait": 15}
